section.heading: Authority for pipeline carriers to establish rates, classifications, rules, and practices
section.chapeau: A pipeline carrier providing transportation or service subject to this part shall establish—

paragraph.content: rates and classifications for transportation and service it may provide under this part; and
rules and practices on matters related to that transportation or service.

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: Provisions similar to those in this section were contained in section 10702 of this title prior to the general amendment of this subtitle by Pub. L. 104–88, § 102(a).

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section effective Jan. 1, 1996, except as otherwise provided in Pub. L. 104–88, see section 2 of Pub. L. 104–88, set out as a note under section 1301 of this title.
